span.p:
Wave 1: Foundation
10 tasks
springdoc + schema + config +
config-dir resilience +
JSONL logging +
HonchoApiVersion + HonchoProvider
+ HonchoClient + Factory

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Wave 2: Honcho Layer
10 tasks
8 V3 Providers + V3Client +
ProxyService + Controller refactor +
HonchoContext + application.yml

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Wave 3: OpenAPI + Tests
8 tasks
openapi.yaml + springdoc snapshot +
drift check + recorded fixtures +
HonchoMockConfig + 3 workflow tests

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Wave 4: Docs + CI
8 tasks
provider/factory/SPI unit tests +
honcho-providers.md +
regenerating-openapi.md +
CI workflow + negative-path tests

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Final: 4 Reviewers
F1 Plan Compliance
F2 Code Quality
F3 Real Manual QA
F4 Scope Fidelity

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Critical Path:
T1 → T5 → T6 → T7 → T8
→ T9 → T14 → T15 → T16
→ T26 → F1-F4
